svg.title: Research Methodology Pipeline for Roman Urdu Sentiment Analysis
svg.desc: End-to-end flowchart showing dataset collection through model evaluation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the RUSAD dataset used in this research')
sendPrompt('Explain the preprocessing pipeline for Roman Urdu text')
g.text: Lowercase · Clean · Normalise · Tokenise · Stop words

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What ML models are used in this research?')
sendPrompt('How do LSTM and Bi-LSTM work for sentiment analysis?')
sendPrompt('How is cross-validation applied in this research?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics are used in this study?')
g.text: Accuracy · Precision · Recall · F1 · Confusion Matrix

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the expected best model for Roman Urdu sentiment analysis?')
g.text: Insights for Roman Urdu NLP research
